---
title: "crawler.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/crawler.ts"
loc: 14
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.50
style_score: 9.37
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 9.02
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fast-glob)

### Exports
- `crawlRepository`
- `crawlRepository`
- `ignore`
- `patterns`
